---
title: "Lemann Index Calculator"
description: "Streamlit app for computing cumulative bowel damage scores in Crohn's disease"
date: 2024-06-01
categories: [IBD, tool, Streamlit, Crohn's disease]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Live]{.project-status .live}

## Problem

The Lemann Index quantifies cumulative structural bowel damage in Crohn's disease across the entire digestive tract -- strictures, fistulae, resections -- integrating findings across segments and imaging modalities. Computing it by hand is tedious and error-prone. Clinicians and researchers need a fast, structured calculator that enforces consistency.

## Approach

A Streamlit web application that accepts segmental MRI damage inputs, applies the Lemann scoring algorithm, and returns both segment-level and composite scores with exportable outputs. Designed for research workflows, not clinical deployment.

## Links

- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/lemann-index-calculator)
- [Zenodo DOI]
- [What is the Lemann Index?](/notes/concepts/lemann-index.qmd)

:::
